findings.title: SQL injection via f-string in execute()
findings.message: SQL query built with string interpolation (CWE-89). User-controlled values in SQL queries enable injection attacks. Use parameterized queries.

findings.title: Command injection via os.system()
findings.message: OS command execution with potential user input (CWE-78). Using os.system() allows command injection. Use subprocess with shell=False.

findings.title: DOM XSS via innerHTML assignment
findings.message: DOM XSS via innerHTML (CWE-79). Assigning user-controlled data to innerHTML enables script injection. Use textContent or DOMPurify.

findings.title: Reflected XSS via Jinja2 Markup()
findings.message: Potential reflected XSS via Jinja2 Markup() (CWE-79). Marking user-controlled data as safe bypasses auto-escaping.

findings.title: LDAP injection via f-string in search filter
findings.message: LDAP query built with string interpolation (CWE-90). User-controlled input in LDAP filters enables injection.

findings.title: Server-side template injection via Jinja2 Template()
findings.message: Server-side template injection (SSTI) via Jinja2 Template with user-controlled input (CWE-1336). SSTI can lead to remote code execution.
